title: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac Implementation Services

fields.headingSection: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac Implementation Services

body200: Enable a cost-effective path to a successful Privileged Management for Windows & Mac implementation.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
BeyondTrust Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac is an enterprise-class, market-leading privilege management solution that allows customers to remove local admin rights, enforce least privilege dynamically across Windows and macOS, prevent malware and phishing attacks, and control applications, all without compromising productivity. With more than four thousand customers and two million endpoints managed worldwide, Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac is the leading solution to help customers achieve zero trust, prevent attacks and fileless threats, and address compliance and cyber insurance requirements.

BeyondTrust Professional Services Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac packages offer scalable services engagements for cloud and on-premises deployments, with a drive toward providing customers self-sufficiency at all points along the engagement. The outcomes you receive are rooted in our best practices and are delivered in several Tiers, each representing increasingly comprehensive solutions.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Tier 1 Outcomes

Delivers essential Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac functionality for up to 1,000 endpoints, helping you to remove local admin rights and achieve least privilege fast, without hindering the productivity of your users. This includes the configuration of policies from our QuickStart policy templates, challenge response functionality, detailed reporting and analytics on user behavior, and setup of end-user communications.

  • Tier 2 Outcomes

Delivers essential Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac functionality for organizations with up to 4,000 endpoints, helping large and complex organizations to achieve least privilege quickly. In addition to the services included in tier 1, tier 2 includes the configuration of integrations with SIEM, MFA, and ticketing solutions.

  • Tier 3 Outcomes

Delivers essential Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows and Mac functionality for organizations with larger scale environments. Supports the deployment of BeyondInsight with multiple event collectors.

title: Endpoint Privilege Management for Linux Cloud Implementation Services

fields.headingSection: Endpoint Privilege Management for Linux Cloud Implementation Services

body200: Endpoint Privilege Management for Linux Cloud Implementation Services
bodyRedactorRestricted:
No servers or controllers are required to deploy Endpoint Privilege Management. SaaS deployment frees you from the cost and hassle of managing, maintaining, and updating on-premises software or equipment.

Deployment is straightforward. Simply download and deploy endpoint agents to all of your Linux endpoints across on-premises, hybrid, and cloud environments.

Endpoint Privilege Management agents periodically communicate with the cloud-based policy and logging servers to receive policy updates and collect audit data. Policy management and auditing are performed via the SaaS-based management console.

BeyondTrust Professional Services Endpoint Privilege Management for Linux Cloud packages offer scalable services engagements, with a drive toward providing customers self-sufficiency at all points along the engagement. The outcomes you receive are rooted in our best practices and are delivered in a pre-built Tiered package.

body200: Enable a cost-effective path to a successful Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux implementation.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
BeyondTrust Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux is an enterprise-class, market-leading privilege management solution that enables customers to effectively manage and control privileges across their Unix and Linux Systems and achieve zero trust. With the largest install base in the market, Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux helps customers eliminate credential sharing, limit root access, and prevent and contain breaches – without hindering productivity and without relying on sudo or custom tools. Robust auditing capabilities, including keystroke logging and session recording, along with centralized management, allow for streamlined compliance and protection.

BeyondTrust Professional Services Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux packages offer scalable services engagements, with a drive toward providing customers self-sufficiency at all points along the engagement. The outcomes you receive are rooted in our best practices and are delivered in several Tiers, each representing increasingly comprehensive solutions.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:

Delivers essential Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux functionality and components for the endpoints in your estate, helping you to remove unrestricted root access and achieve least privilege. This includes setup of the BeyondInsight for Unix and Linux management platform, configuration of role-based and administrator policies, and setup of Solr keystroke log indexing.

  • Tier 2 Outcomes

Delivers expanded guidance on advanced use cases and integrations, helping you to better tailor Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux for your organization and incorporate it into your existing security tech stack. This includes configuration of script-based policy and setup of integrations with BeyondInsight for Unix and Linux, as well as SIEM and ITSM integrations.

  • Tier 3 Outcomes

Delivers support for larger infrastructure deployments, helping large and complex organizations get up to speed fast with Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux. This includes setup of added policy and log servers as well as customized configuration of file integrity monitoring functionality.

BeyondTrust Identity Security Insights, the cornerstone of our identity security platform, helps you proactively assess, monitor, and strengthen your identity security posture. It continuously analyzes your identity landscape, including both human and non-human identities, uncovering hidden identity risks and paths to elevated privileges that attacker might exploit. It also tracks changes and activities across your dynamic environment, helping prevent the accumulation of vulnerabilities and unintended privileges. With prescriptive recommendations, timely detections, and broad integrations with leading security tools, you can effectively address risks and enhance your organization’s defenses to build resilience against modern identity-driven threats.

title: Health Checks
body200: Identify opportunities to improve security and usability as the needs of your business evolve.
bodyRedactorRestricted: BeyondTrust recognizes that companies grow and change over time. In today’s dynamic IT environments, a few months can bring about significant shifts in your technical ecosystem. To ensure that your company continues to get the most out of its BeyondTrust solutions, the BeyondTrust Professional Services team offers the Health Check and Expansion Readiness Packages.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
Health Check Workshop: Your health check starts with a session to review current state usage, any existing challenges and the future goals of your BeyondTrust solution.

Health Check Recommendations Report: Upon completion of your health check, you will receive a custom report detailing recommended changes to optimize your BeyondTrust solution based on your specific environment as well as our experience in best practice deployments.

Recommendations Report Session: In collaboration with your team, a meeting is conducted to review in detail your company's report, offering the opportunity for Q&A and clarifications on BeyondTrust's recommendations.

To ensure that your company continues to get the most out of its Privileged Access Management (PAM) and Remote Support solutions, the BeyondTrust Professional Services team offers the Health Check and Expansion Readiness Packages.

These workshops are designed to review environmental health and performance, offer recommendations, and maximize the value of your investment. Whether you are getting ready to expand, integrate, or just need a general health check, we have a program to help.

Depending on the options selected, you’ll walk away with a technical report that explains changes and improvements to your current solution, as well as an executive summary highlighting business risks/gaps that should be addressed to meet current and future business demands.
